description: A v0.2.0 Class B artifact attempting to transition out of INVALID MUST be rejected. INVALID is terminal per invariant B4. The artifact MUST receive INVALID status with reason INVALID_TERMINAL_TRANSITION.

input.claim: this execution occurred with the declared observed result

transition_reason.narrative: Attempting to recover from INVALID by re-attesting the artifact with corrected fields.

why: SPEC_LOCK_v0.2.0 §2.6.1 forbidden rule: any transition out of INVALID is forbidden. Invariant B4 makes INVALID terminal. The artifact MUST be re-issued under a new vector_id; mutating an INVALID artifact is rejected with reason INVALID_TERMINAL_TRANSITION. Adversarial: this vector is the recovery-attack vector — a system that lets INVALID artifacts heal is non-conformant.
